usage: assembleDesign [-help] [-dontMergeBlockPGNets] [-keepPGPinGeometry] [-keep_block_halo] [-outFile <fileName>] [-skipNets] { { [-topDir <dirname> [-mmmcFile <mmmcFile>] [-cpfFile <cpfFile>] ] {[-blockDir <dirname> [ [-fplan ]]][-blockData {defFileName netListFileName} | {-fplan } ] } } | {[-topDesign {topLib topCell topView} [-mmmcFile <mmmcFile>] [-cpfFile <cpfFile>] ] {[-block {blockLib blockCell blockView} | -blockCell <blockCell> ] [-allTimingBlocks [-exceptBlocks {list of blocks}] [-reportOnly ]]}} } [ -fplan ] [-keepPinGeometry ] [{-blockData {defFileName netListFileName} } [-skipCells ] [-skipComponents ] [-skipSpecialNets ]]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -allTimingBlocks
options.description: Enables automatic detection and assembly of blocks with digital content.

options.name: -block
options.description: The OpenAccess database's directory, cell and view for the block cell.

options.name: -blockCell
options.description: The cell name for the block cell.

options.name: -blockData
options.description: {defFileName netListFileName} The def file and the netlist file

options.name: -blockDir
options.description: The diretory which contains the block level design

options.name: -cpfFile
options.description: Chip level cpf file

options.name: -dontMergeBlockPGNets
options.description: Don't Merge Block PG nets to top

options.name: -exceptBlocks
options.description: List of block names not to assemble even if they do contain digital content. This option only applies to the case where -allTimingBlocks is used. If not specified, there is no restriction on the detection and assembly that is automatically determined.

options.name: -fplan
options.description: Only assemble floorplan data

options.name: -keepPGPinGeometry
options.description: Retain partition PG pin geometry

options.name: -keepPinGeometry
options.description: Create DRCFILL shape corresponding to partition pin geometry

options.name: -keep_block_halo
options.description: Preserve block place and route halo

options.name: -mmmcFile
options.description: Chip level mmmc file

options.name: -outFile
options.description: Specifies name of the output file. Default: ./<design>.assembleDesign.rpt

options.name: -reportOnly
options.description: With this option, the command only reports the list of blocks which would be assembled and does not perform actual assembling.

options.name: -skipCells
options.description: Skip merging std cells

options.name: -skipComponents
options.description: Skip merging all components

options.name: -skipNets
options.description: Skip merging signal routes

options.name: -skipSpecialNets
options.description: Skip merging special routes

options.name: -topDesign
options.description: The OpenAccess database's directory, cell and view for the top cell.

options.name: -topDir
options.description: The directory which contains the top level design
